upstream_signal_integrity.message: ER V1.7.1 does not mark green unless upstream language/function control permits it.

color_legend.green: Keep: upstream engines confirm good enough language and useful IELTS function.
color_legend.yellow: Improve/check: upstream engines found repair need or sentence-control confirmation is missing.
color_legend.red: Rewrite: upstream engines show low control, multiple local problems, or paragraph-function pressure.

copyable_clean_text:
In my opinion I agree with this statement because community service teach students many important things. Nowadays many teenager only think about their phone and games, they dont care about other peoples in society. If school make it compulsory, students will learns responsibility and become more helpful person.

Firstly, when student doing community service, they meets different peoples from society, like old peoples or homeless peoples. This experience teach them empathy that they cannot learn it from books. For example, my cousin he was volunteer in hospital last year and now he understand more about how difficult is for sick peoples.

Secondly, this activity also good for students resume when they applying to university. Many universities want to see student who have real experience, not only good grades. So compulsory service can help student in future also.

However, some people think it should be voluntary because student have already too much homework and exam pressure. This is true but I think school can organize it in weekend so it dont effect their study to much.

In conclusion, I believe unpaid community service must be compulsory in high school because it bring many benefit for both student and society, even though there is some challenge to manage the time.
revision_editor_seed:
In my opinion I agree with this statement because community service teach students many important things. Nowadays many teenager only think about their phone and games, they dont care about other peoples in society. If school make it compulsory, students will learns responsibility and become more helpful person.

Firstly, when student doing community service, they meets different peoples from society, like old peoples or homeless peoples. This experience teach them empathy that they cannot learn it from books. For example, my cousin he was volunteer in hospital last year and now he understand more about how difficult is for sick peoples.

Secondly, this activity also good for students resume when they applying to university. Many universities want to see student who have real experience, not only good grades. So compulsory service can help student in future also.

However, some people think it should be voluntary because student have already too much homework and exam pressure. This is true but I think school can organize it in weekend so it dont effect their study to much.

In conclusion, I believe unpaid community service must be compulsory in high school because it bring many benefit for both student and society, even though there is some challenge to manage the time.

prewriting_guidance.title: Before you write or revise

structure_options.name: Universal IELTS Task 2 structure
paragraphs: Introduction: task frame, clear answer/position, preview main ideas.
Body 1: one main idea, explanation, specific example, link.
Body 2: one main idea, explanation, specific example, link.
Conclusion: summary + final answer. No new example or idea.

body_paragraph_formula: Topic sentence: say the paragraph's main idea.
Argument/reason: explain why the idea matters.
Development: add cause, effect, comparison, or consequence.
Link back: connect the example to the question or your position.

example_quality.strong_example_rule: Use a specific place/actor/programme/situation, show what happened, and link it to the argument.
example_quality.weak_example_rule: Avoid private family anecdotes or very general examples as the main evidence.
